title: Story Mode Battle Music
description: Replaces the tracks from Mob Battle Music with tracks from Minecraft Story Mode
body:
Reqiures Mob Battle Music to work.

This resource pack replaces the tracks from nonamecracker2's mob battle music mod with tracks from minecraft story mode.

Featuring two tracks: Action Suspense and Ivor Fight.

I know there are other rescource packs out there that do the same thing but i didn't know when making this.

Credit to mcreator, FL studio mobile, and bandcamp.
